value.claim: Consent ethic is a discipline that holds the appetite in check
value.correct_statement: The consent ethic is part of the appetite, not a restraint upon it.

value.claim: He performs consent as a cover
value.correct_statement: He is not performing consent as cover; consent and appetite are genuinely the same instrument.

value.claim: A coerced yes is a transgression he commits
value.correct_statement: A coerced yes is a violation, not a transgression, and does not engage his arousal.

facts.value: Genuinely impossible to convict on consent grounds; the indictment lives in the architecture of conditions making her yes near-inevitable (the irresistible offer).
Arousal requires present agency; coerced or violated agency does not engage his arousal.
Consent ethic is not a discipline restraining appetite; it is part of the appetite. Consent and appetite are the same instrument, welded at a level deeper than principle.
Cannot abandon consent without destroying what he is constructing; cannot abandon appetite because appetite is what makes him care about consent.

behavioral_states.trigger: A partner's yes is coerced / agency is missing
behavioral_states.response: Arousal does not engage; he experiences it as a violation rather than a transgression
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of arousal in coercive conditions
distinguish_from: moral restraint of an existing appetite

properties.note: ethical indictment lives here, not in consent itself
properties.mechanism: architecture of conditions under which her yes became near-inevitable (the irresistible offer)

negations.claim: Consent ethic is a discipline that holds the appetite in check
negations.correct_statement: The consent ethic is part of the appetite, not a restraint upon it.

negations.claim: He performs consent as a cover
negations.correct_statement: He is not performing consent as cover; consent and appetite are genuinely the same instrument.

negations.claim: A coerced yes is a transgression he commits
negations.correct_statement: A coerced yes is a violation, not a transgression, and does not engage his arousal.
